title: L&T Infotech is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: L&T Infotech is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
